title: Find the canonical REST endpoint to list GitHub repos for a user
goal: Report the correct GitHub REST API endpoint and HTTP verb to list public repositories for a given user.
final_answer:
GitHub REST endpoint to list a user's public repositories:
  GET /users/{username}/repos
Example: GET https://api.github.com/users/torvalds/repos
(Source: docs.github.com/en/rest/repos/repos.)
